description: A five-course interactive dining experience at our Chef's Counter. The menu changes nightly, shaped by what arrived that morning.

courses.label: II
courses.name: Crudo & Garden
courses.desc: Raw or lightly cured fish · seasonal vegetable · cold pressed oil

courses.label: III
courses.name: The Hearth Course
courses.desc: Wood-fired preparation · preserved element · fermented accent

courses.label: IV
courses.name: Land & Sea
courses.desc: Primary protein · root vegetable · foraged herb

finePrint: Advanced reservations required. As the menu changes nightly, we cannot guarantee accommodation of all dietary restrictions.
